global_rules: Read all materially changed option-path files end to end before claiming semantic repair.
Use the latest closed Gate 171-180 pack as evidence input only; do not copy its structure as the new pack.
A request to complete multiple gates does not waive per-gate sequencing, validation, router updates, or closeout.
Gate 185 may add one bounded surface-anchor divergence feature, but must not create a second playbook engine or opaque options scalar.
Gate 186 closeout must prove the Gate 180 pack remains closed evidence while the new pack truthfully becomes the active or latest closed pack.

LEAF-G181-001.title: Install the options-trace repair planning quartet and scope note
ordered_actions: Create the active gates/leaves/execution-log/checklist/scope-note files for Gates 181-186.
Freeze the findings truth split so F1/F2/F4 are scoped as repairs, F3 as a bounded feature gap, and F5 as out of scope.
Keep Gate 181 planning-only; do not edit runtime behaviour in this bootstrap gate.
forbidden_actions: Do not start fixing option-path code in Gate 181.
Do not collapse all findings into one vague repair gate.
Do not treat the findings report as authoritative over current repo truth.
expected_evidence: Active planning quartet and scope note exist with Gates 181-186 and the findings truth split.
Pack remains planning-only at Gate 181.
definition_of_done: Pack surfaces exist and the findings truth split is explicit.
No option-path runtime code is changed in Gate 181.
LEAF-G181-001.packaging_requirement: record in the active execution log and include a fresh full-history repo zip whenever the operator requests a handoff or the pack reaches a gate closeout

LEAF-G181-002.title: Route the repo truthfully to Gate 182
ordered_actions: Update PLANS.md so the options-trace repair pack is the active pack.
Update the canonical gate map to record Gate 181 complete and Gate 182 active.
Preserve the closed Gate 171-180 pack as latest predecessor evidence.
forbidden_actions: Do not leave PLANS.md saying no active pack exists.
Do not erase Gate 180 evidence surfaces.
Do not pretend Gate 182 work is already complete.
expected_evidence: Router surfaces point to Gate 182 in the new pack.
Gate 180 pack remains closed evidence.
definition_of_done: PLANS and gate map agree on Gate 182 as the active gate.
Earlier closeout/planning tests allow this later lawful state.
LEAF-G181-002.packaging_requirement: record in the active execution log and include a fresh full-history repo zip whenever the operator requests a handoff or the pack reaches a gate closeout

ordered_actions: Freeze variable gate and leaf counts that preserve granularity for this repair tranche.

forbidden_actions: Do not force a fixed five-gate or four-leaf cardinality just because another pack used it.
Do not leave migration or vocabulary decisions implied if later gates may need them.
Do not omit the F3 feature treatment from the pack.
expected_evidence: Gate structure differentiates F1, F2, F4, F3, and final closeout.

definition_of_done: Later gates are bounded, non-placeholder, and clearly scoped.

LEAF-G181-003.packaging_requirement: record in the active execution log and include a fresh full-history repo zip whenever the operator requests a handoff or the pack reaches a gate closeout
